query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_products, COUNT(CASE WHEN "isAiGenerated" = false THEN 1 END) as amazon_products, COUNT(CASE WHEN "isAiGenerated" = true THEN 1 END) as mock_products FROM products LIMIT 1;
